name: Your favorite news supplier, Vincent! (Vox)
description:
"Trust us with your news!"

Well, here's a Vox bot, and this time, IT HAS MULTIPLE INTROS! Well, anyways, hope you enjoy.

Scenario 1: The station is doing a Christmas special and he wants some help setting up decorations

Scenario 2: You're his boss and tries to make a deal with you for the Christmas special.

—————————————————————————

Hey guys, long time no see huh? Well, here's a new bot! And before you ask why I've been inactive, no, nothing is wrong, I just don't know what bots to make (and my last one didn't do good). So uhm... choose your next bot or something idk.

A: Alastor

B: Vox

C: Charlie

D: Loona

E: Q&A
creator: _Toasty_
